Variables.Name: Text
Variables.Description: The text content for this editable text box widget

Variables.Name: TextDelegate
Variables.Description: A bindable delegate to allow logic to drive the text of the widget

Variables.Name: HintText
Variables.Description: Hint text that appears when there is no text in the text box

Variables.Name: HintTextDelegate
Variables.Description: A bindable delegate to allow logic to drive the hint text of the widget

Variables.Name: WidgetStyle
Variables.Description: The style

Variables.Name: Style_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Text style

Variables.Name: BackgroundImageSelected_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Background image for the selected text (overrides Style)

Variables.Name: BackgroundImageComposing_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Background image for the composing text (overrides Style)

Variables.Name: CaretImage_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Image brush used for the caret (overrides Style)

Variables.Name: Font_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Font color and opacity (overrides Style)

Variables.Name: ColorAndOpacity_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Text color and opacity (overrides Style)

Variables.Name: IsReadOnly
Variables.Description: Sets whether this text box can actually be modified interactively by the user

Variables.Name: IsPassword
Variables.Description: Sets whether this text box is for storing a password

Variables.Name: MinimumDesiredWidth
Variables.Description: Minimum width that a text block should be

Variables.Name: IsCaretMovedWhenGainFocus
Variables.Description: Workaround as we lose focus when the auto completion closes.

Variables.Name: SelectAllTextWhenFocused
Variables.Description: Whether to select all text when the user clicks to give focus on the widget

Variables.Name: RevertTextOnEscape
Variables.Description: Whether to allow the user to back out of changes when they press the escape key

Variables.Name: ClearKeyboardFocusOnCommit
Variables.Description: Whether to clear keyboard focus when pressing enter to commit changes

Variables.Name: SelectAllTextOnCommit
Variables.Description: Whether to select all text when pressing enter to commit changes

Variables.Name: AllowContextMenu
Variables.Description: Whether the context menu can be opened

Variables.Name: KeyboardType
Variables.Description: If we're on a platform that requires a virtual keyboard, what kind of keyboard should this widget use?

Variables.Name: ShapedTextOptions
Variables.Description: Controls how the text within this widget should be shaped.

Functions.Name: SetText
Functions.Description:
Directly sets the widget text.
	  Warning: This will wipe any binding created for the Text property!

Params.Name: InText
Params.Description: The text to assign to the widget

Delegate.Name: OnTextChanged
Delegate.Description: Called whenever the text is changed interactively by the user

Delegate.Name: OnTextCommitted
Delegate.Description: Called whenever the text is committed.  This happens when the user presses enter or the text box loses focus.

Delegate.Name: OnTextBeginEditTransation
Delegate.Description: Called to begin an undoable editable text transaction

Delegate.Name: OnTextEndEditTransaction
Delegate.Description: Called to end an undoable editable text transaction
